title: How To Cancel No Hesi Subscriptions

messages.content: # Want to cancel your No Hesi Subscription? Follow this guide!

# Scroll down to see what website pertains to you. All 3 websites we offer are on here.
> Patreon -
> Discord -
> Website -

# Patreon
## Step 1
> Press on the **Settings** located at the Top Left Side
## Step 2
> Select on **Memberships** located at the Top Right Middle Side

## Step 3
> On this page, you should see your Subscriptions, press on **View Details** and then **edit**
## Step 4
> Underneath **Update**, it should show **Edit** or **Cancel Membership **, press on it

## Step 5
> Click **Cancel your membership** then click **Cancel your membership**

# Discord
## Step 1
> Press on the **Cog Wheel** next to your username at the bottom right corner of the client to open up **User Settings**.

## Step 2
> Select on **Subscriptions** in the left side panel.
## Step 3
> On this page, you should see your subscriptions, including memberships. Press on the **Manage Membership** button.
## Step 4
> The Server Subscription page will show your memberships across all servers as well as each membership's costs and billing/renewal dates.
## Step 5
> Press on **Cancel Subscription** next to the membership you want to cancel and confirm your decision!

# Website
## Step 1
> Go to the website https://www.nohesi.gg
## Step 2
> Click your Profile Picture, then navigate to **Billing**

## Step 3
> Under Billing it will say what you have and underneath it, it will say **cancel**.
## Step 4
> Click on it and it will send you to an external site, and there you will be able to cancel the subscription.
-# *(Note, you can not delete the card unless you have 2 or more cards saved)*
